violations.text: The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. Paper towels were provided during the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/20/2026

The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher in kitchen was (00) parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. Establishment is to use 3 bay sink or dish washer at bar until kitchen dish machine is reading 50-100 ppm. Repair service was called during inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 07/11/2023
Mops must be allowed to air dry after use. Mop was observed sitting in bucket. established shall install hooks for hanging mops. New Violation. Correct By: 07/11/2023
